---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new tool for Vibesterz
title: "[Idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The idea**

A clear description of what you would like to see.

**The problem it solves**

What are you trying to do that is hard or not possible today.

**How you imagine it working**

Any detail on how you picture it, if you have a view.

**Anything else**

Links, examples or context that would help.
